Property.Name: Material
Property.sap:quickinfo: Material in Respect of Which Stock is Managed

Property.Name: Batch
Property.sap:quickinfo: Batch Number of Warehouse Stock (Stock Identifier)

Property.Name: Supplier
Property.sap:quickinfo: Supplier to be Supplied/Who is to Receive Delivery

Property.Name: WBSElement
Property.sap:label: WBS Element
Property.sap:quickinfo: Work Breakdown Structure Element (WBS Element) Edited

Property.Name: InventoryStockType
Property.sap:label: Stock Type
Property.sap:quickinfo: Stock Type of Goods Movement (Stock Identifier)

Property.Name: GoodsMovementReasonCode
Property.sap:label: Reason for Movement
Property.sap:quickinfo: Not More Closely Defined Area, Possibly Used for Patchlevels

Property.Name: BillOfLading
Property.sap:label: Bill of Lading
Property.sap:quickinfo: Number of Bill of Lading at Time of Goods Receipt

Property.Name: IssuingOrReceivingStockType
Property.sap:label: Stock Type (Transfer)
Property.sap:quickinfo: Stock Type of Goods Movement (Stock Identifier)

Property.Name: IsStorLocAuthznCheckActive
Property.sap:label: Authorization check
Property.sap:quickinfo: Storage location authorization for goods movements active

Property.Name: IsIssgOrRcvgStorLocAuthChkActv
Property.sap:label: Authorization check
Property.sap:quickinfo: Storage location authorization for goods movements active

PropertyValue.String: Value Help Inventory Special Stock Type
Help view for issuing and receiving plants
Help-View for issuing and receiving storage locations
Help-View for issuing and receiving stock type
